title: Steady beta surface triage
summary: Start the big beta-foundation push by fixing the cramped station and journal surfaces exposed in the Source to Shore review, without changing route state or adding new systems.

execution_order.goal: Scope the smallest visible UI/layout fix pass for the station subtitle/tab collision and journal route progress clipping.
execution_order.why_now: These are live-facing polish cuts on the most important late-game hub and first-session journal guidance.

execution_order.goal: Implement the scoped layout fixes with focused coverage or browser proof at the native handheld size.
execution_order.why_now: The beta foundation should begin by making the existing surfaces calm and readable before structural changes land.

execution_order.goal: Review the visual triage for copy fit, tab spacing, journal progress readability, and absence of route-state drift.
execution_order.why_now: Small layout fixes can easily hide regressions on a 256x160 surface, so critique should clear the baseline before the container work starts.

completion_gate: Station homecoming subtitle no longer collides with the SEASON/NURSERY tabs in the Source to Shore state.
Journal route progress labels such as `0/3 stages` render without clipping.
No route-state, save-state, route data, station page identity, or Source to Shore content behavior changes land in this packet.
Focused layout/station/journal proof or tests pass, plus agent validation if queue or packet files move.

implementation_contract: Use `src/engine/overlay-render.ts` as the only runtime edit target for this packet.
Move the field-station subtitle and `SEASON` / `NURSERY` tabs into non-overlapping vertical rows while preserving the compact 256x160 panel shape.
Make the journal field-request progress label measured and trimmed from the same string that is right-aligned, with a wider reserved title/progress split so labels such as `0/3 stages` fit.
Add or adjust focused runtime proof in `src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts`; reuse Source to Shore board state assertions in `src/test/field-season-board.test.ts` as behavior parity.
out_of_scope: Do not change Source to Shore route state, save state, route data, or authored beat count.
Do not implement the dedicated Source to Shore station container in this packet.
Do not edit `src/engine/field-season-board.ts` except as read-only context.
Do not introduce new station pages, planner UI, dashboard UI, or copy systems.
proof_expectations: `npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts src/test/field-season-board.test.ts -t "Source to Shore|journal"` or an equivalently focused station/journal slice.
Native 256x160 browser proof of the Source to Shore field-station routes page and journal route card, ideally using the existing Playwright web-game client.

runtime_changes: `src/engine/overlay-render.ts` now reserves a measured progress-label lane in the journal route card and right-aligns the same fitted progress text that it draws.
`src/engine/overlay-render.ts` now lowers the field-station `SEASON` / `NURSERY` tab row so the subtitle/homecoming line has a clear vertical row above it.
tests_added: `src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts` records fake-canvas text coordinates for renderer layout guards.
`src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts` now checks the Source to Shore station subtitle is separated from the station tabs.
`src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts` now checks a fresh journal route card draws `0/3 stages` without ellipsis trimming.
verification: Targeted 256x160 Playwright proof at `output/lane-1-main-449-browser/` with empty `errors.json`.

notes: The station subtitle/homecoming line and `SEASON` / `NURSERY` tab row are separated in the Source to Shore beta station proof.
The fresh journal route card renders `0/3 stages` in full.
No route-state, save-state, Source to Shore beat-count, station-container, or new copy-system drift landed.
critic_review.post_packet_gate: Surface baseline is clear; `ECO-20260428-main-450` can open after `ECO-20260428-scout-450` finishes the Source to Shore station-container scope.

guardrails: Do not introduce the Source to Shore container in this packet.
Do not add routes, route beats, save fields, station pages, planner UI, or new copy systems.
Keep all visible copy compact for the 256x160 handheld viewport.
Prefer measured spacing/budget fixes over broad overlay rewrites.
post_packet_path: Promote the Source to Shore station-container implementation only after the surface baseline is clean.
Carry any additional layout debt into a new packet rather than widening this first pass.
